testcase.name: Carrier Public Profile - US-710 › AC-1: Shipper views carrier performance profile
Carrier Public Profile - US-710 › AC-2: Benchmark comparison displays correctly
Carrier Public Profile - US-710 › AC-3: Carrier interest count displays social proof
Carrier Public Profile - US-710 › AC-4: Multi-tenancy isolation message displays
Carrier Public Profile - US-710 › Service areas and equipment types display
Carrier Public Profile - US-710 › Shipper can add carrier to preferred list from profile
Carrier Public Profile - US-710 › Profile styling complies with Style Guide (colors, typography)
Carrier Public Profile - US-710 › Profile is accessible (keyboard navigation)
Carrier Public Profile - US-710 › Profile loads within 2 seconds (performance)
Carrier Cost Profile Setup — US-757 › should save cost profile and persist after reload (US-757 AC-1)

testcase.name: Login Integration Tests (US-756) › should render login form in <100ms on initial load
Login Integration Tests (US-756) › should display error message on failed login
testcase.system-out: ✓ Backend returned 401 for invalid credentials ✓ Error message displayed: "Invalid email or password"

testcase.name: Login Integration Tests (US-756) › should handle network throttling gracefully
testcase.system-out: ✓ Page loaded with 3G throttling in 1053ms, form interactive

testcase.name: Login Integration Tests (US-756) › should maintain auth state on page refresh
testcase.system-out: ✓ Auth state: redirected to login (expected for fresh test) ✓ Auth state persists across page refresh

testcase.name: Login Integration Tests (US-756) › should validate required fields on submit
Login Integration Tests (US-756) › should validate email format before submission
testcase.system-out: ✓ Email validation error displayed: "Enter a valid email"
